Internal memo: PDPA/CMSA controls for Project Cendana – from Company Secretary (Saujana Lattice Berhad) to Board, CFO, and Compliance, dated 29 May 2026.
The proposed private placement (up to 62,000,000 new SLB shares at RM1.12 per share, ~8% discount to 5‑day VWAP) with Bintang Arteri Capital Sdn Bhd is non‑public and constitutes MNPI under the Exchange Main Market Listing Requirements and applicable capital markets laws.
A conditional share purchase with Rimba Digital Sdn Bhd (60% stake for RM45m; anticipated EPS accretion ~6% in FY2027) remains confidential; do not circulate beyond the insider list until the announcement is cleared for release by the Exchange.
Under PDPA, personal data in employment and financing drafts must be minimised: names, emails, device IDs, session logs, payroll accounts, office locations, and DOBs can directly or indirectly identify a data subject.
Clustered identifiers: Encik Firdaus Ilyas bin Mahzan (Chief Projects Officer, Saujana Lattice Berhad), DOB 12 March 1984 (age 42), office at HQ—Bandar Seri Angkasa, Negeri Damar, work email firdaus.mahzan@saujanalattice.com, staff ID SLB‑EMP‑0421, device SLB‑Laptop‑FA84 and Mahaphone‑X2 SN MPX2‑FA84‑6109, payroll at Nova Kelapa Bank Berhad a/c ending 7719.
Further context for the same individual: VPN session SLB‑VPN‑26‑05‑29‑7842 connected 08:41–10:02 via internal IP 10.28.17.51, Teams invite ref SLB‑INV‑2026‑0530 (Meranti 3), and security door access log 4F‑317 at 08:39; these are PDPA‑relevant when combined.
Separately, the following weak items appear in templates and are not tied to any named staff: DOB 1990‑07‑14, device tag LPT‑8871, generic account ref 3301, and “Suite 1205, Menara Jati, Precinct Aria, 52110, Negeri Damar.”
Generic descriptors (e.g., male in his thirties located in the central region) on their own should not be treated as identifying under PDPA, but avoid combining them with device or account references.
HR queries may be directed to Puan Zulaikha Noor, HR Business Partner, zulaikha.noor@saujanalattice.com, tel +60 3 4800 7702.
Compliance queries on insider lists and data rooms: compliance@saujanalattice.com; physical access is restricted to Secure Room Kenari, Level 8, HQ.
No external communication on pricing, timetables, or expected proceeds may be made until the draft announcement is finalised and approved; a trading blackout applies to the insider list (including Encik Firdaus) until publication.
Please redact bank account numbers, device serials, and session identifiers in Board packs; if necessary, retain only last four digits or truncated hashes (e.g., SLB‑VPN‑…‑7842).
The financing term sheet with Bintang Arteri Capital Sdn Bhd includes a maintenance covenant (Net Debt/EBITDA ≤ 2.5x) and a cross‑default trigger if EBITDA falls below RM60m; these terms are MNPI until the Exchange release.
For avoidance of doubt, this memo does not include customer NRICs, credit card numbers, or health data, and any personal data herein is limited to internal staff for legitimate corporate purposes.
